name: Outlook
shortDescription: Microsoft Outlook integration for comprehensive email, calendar, and contact management with OAuth2 authentication for secure access to Microsoft 365 accounts.

actions.name: Get User Profile
actions.description: Retrieves the profile details of the signed-in user including display name, email, and other basic information.

actions.name: Get Messages List
actions.description: Retrieves a list of email messages from the user's mailbox with optional filtering by sender, subject, date range, and read status.

actions.name: Send Message
actions.description: Sends an email to the specified recipient with the provided content and optional parameters like subject, CC, and BCC.

actions.name: Reply to Message
actions.description: Sends a reply to an existing email with the specified content and optional parameters.

actions.name: Create Draft Email
actions.description: Creates a draft email with the specified content and optional parameters that can be sent later.

actions.name: Send Draft Email
actions.description: Sends an email from an existing draft specified by the draft ID.

actions.name: Create Event
actions.description: Creates a calendar event with the specified details such as subject, start and end time, time zone, location, description, and attendees.

actions.name: Delete Event
actions.description: Deletes a calendar event specified by the unique event ID.

actions.name: Update Calendar Event
actions.description: Updates an existing calendar event with the provided details including subject, body, time, and attendees.

actions.name: Add Attendees to Calendar Event
actions.description: Adds attendees to an existing calendar event without overwriting existing attendees.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Creates a new contact in the user's contact list with basic information including name, email, phone, and company details.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Updates an existing contact in the user's contact list with basic information including name, email, phone, and company details.

actions.name: Mark Email As Unread
actions.description: Marks an email as unread in the user's inbox to indicate it needs attention.

idealUseCases: Automated email sending and management workflows
Email draft creation and batch sending
